text.title: evaluation-benchmarks Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for evaluation-benchmarks as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using ModelComparison.rankings["latency_ms"][0] as the "best" model selection.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The highest latency model is ranked first by the default sort; the agent selects the slowest model when it intends to pick the fastest.

failure-mode.description: Using the same test set to tune prompts and then to evaluate quality.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The test set is no longer an unbiased evaluator once it has been used to optimize — benchmark overfitting produces inflated scores.

failure-mode.description: Running ProductionEvaluator.evaluate_request with random.random() and expecting reproducible debugging of a specific production failure.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Non-seeded sampling is not reproducible; the failing request will not reliably be re-captured. Log all raw requests separately from the evaluation sample.
